title: justicia mollissima
intro: Justicia mollissima, also known as Mexican honeysuckle, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's leaves and flowers have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Justicia mollissima is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
